gloss.alarm: set/change/check a wake-up ALARM at a clock time
gloss.timer: set/check a countdown TIMER for a duration
gloss.reminder: manage REMINDERS to do a specific task
gloss.calendar: ask what events are on the CALENDAR by date
gloss.todo_list: manage a TO-DO LIST of tasks for the day
gloss.meeting_schedule: ask when a MEETING with someone is scheduled
